name: Marshall Christian Academy
description: Marshall Christian Academy is a place to play pickleball in Marshall, TX. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Marshall Convention Center
description: Marshall Convention Center is a place to play pickleball in Marshall, TX. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.
fees: Fee required — $5 Daily Pass  $50 Punch Card (Good for 10 sessions)  $100 Summer Pass (Good for one person between May-August)
